headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -43.9)
key_insights: Optimism trending down 36% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 125 quotes and a heavy concentration of strong-intensity comments (85 strong vs 37 moderate), driving the score up sharply from yesterday.
• This frustration level sits in the lower-middle range historically but represents a significant 3.6x jump from yesterday's mild activity.
• Optimism remains deeply negative with many strong quotes, while fears improved modestly but stay near their recent low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
